/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librover_project__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o librover_project__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/rover_project__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/rover_project/msg/proximity__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rover_project__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/rover_project/msg/gps_fix__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rover_project__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/rover_project/msg/imu_orientation__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rover_project__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/rover_project/msg/nav_goal__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rover_project__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/rover_project/msg/waypoint_list__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
